title: Bounded Operations-Web Preview Promote And Promoted-Host Smoke Execution
objective: Promote the newest ready `apex-operations-web` preview deployment to production and rerun the governed promoted-host smoke against `https://operations.apexpowerops.com` so the Packet 025 remediation can be validated on the actual public host.
execution_scope: Inspect the newest ready preview deployment for `apex-operations-web` and promote it to production using the already-validated Vercel path.
Reinspect `https://operations.apexpowerops.com` after promotion to confirm the production alias moved.
Capture whether the promoted host still targets localhost, now targets same-origin `/api/v1`, or fully passes the governed smoke.
explicit_no_go_items: runtime or service mutation outside the hosted deploy promote

execution_evidence.pm_public_host_request_proof: drivers page now requests https://operations.apexpowerops.com/api/v1/schedule/drivers?project_id=stack-dc instead of localhost
execution_evidence.approval_public_host_request_proof: approval surface now requests https://operations.apexpowerops.com/api/v1/reads/* instead of localhost, but those requests return 404 on the promoted host
execution_evidence.browser_smoke_follow_up: promoted-host browser smoke still fails in browser-shell.apparatus.smoke.spec.ts and browser-shell.relay.smoke.spec.ts outside the Packet 025 static-surface slice

next_packet_candidate: Olares Dev Residency 029 - Post-028 Public Mutation-Seam Deployment Boundary Decision
closure_note: Executed 2026-05-05. Packet 028 promoted the newest ready operations-web preview to production, production alias propagation completed to deployment `dpl_3rR9YukiwRwnMcdbKN87Hh87rpVr`, hosted route smoke still passed 8/8, and the remediated PM/approval surfaces now call same-origin `/api/v1` instead of `localhost`. Live-data readiness remains unproven because the promoted host and the public control-plane host both return `404` for the PM `reads` and `schedule` routes, and the broader promoted-host browser smoke still reports two non-PM failures in the apparatus and relay shell specs.
next_action: Execute Packet 029 as the smallest truthful post-028 decision on the missing public mutation-seam deployment or ingress contract.
